pending.title: Account pending validation
pending.subtitle: Your request has been received. Our team will review your application and get back to you.
pending.step1: Check your inbox — a confirmation email has just been sent.
pending.step2: Our team validates your company within 24–48 hours.
pending.step3: Once validated, you'll be able to access your dashboard.
pending.emailHint: Didn't receive an email? Check your spam folder.

Applications.title: Applications & credentials
Applications.subtitle: Manage your applications, their APP_ID and APP_SECRET to secure your SDK integration.
Applications.noApplications: No application yet. Create one below.

Dashboard.widgetsPlaceholder: Your widgets will appear here — set up your first widget from the menu.

hero.title: Understand your users, as it happens
hero.subtitle: decode-analytics captures navigation, clicks, and server events to deliver a customizable real-time dashboard — KPIs, charts, and heatmaps included.

features.title: Everything you need to analyze behavior
features.subtitle: A modular backoffice designed for webmasters who want precise data without the complexity.

kpi.title: Custom KPIs
kpi.description: Track unique visitors, conversion rates, or any metric. Display absolute values or rates, filtered by tags and time range.

realtime.title: Real-time updates
realtime.description: Widgets refresh instantly via WebSocket. No manual refresh — your data stays live as events flow in.

heatmap.title: Click heatmaps
heatmap.description: Visualize where users click on your pages. Overlay heat intensity on a page screenshot for quick UX insights.

sdk.title: Lightweight SDK
sdk.description: Integrate in minutes with our front and back SDKs. Secure via APP_ID, CORS, and HMAC signatures.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From integration to insights, decode-analytics stays simple.

integrate.title: Integrate the SDK
integrate.description: Add the front SDK to your site and the back SDK to your server. Generate your credentials in one click.

configure.title: Configure tracking
configure.description: Create tags and conversion funnels. Define what matters for your business.

analyze.title: Build your dashboard
analyze.description: Add widgets, set your filters, and watch your data update in real time.

cta.title: Ready to decode your audience?
cta.subtitle: Create your webmaster account and start tracking in minutes.
